summary: Completed testing of Family Dashboard, Memory Timeline, Mira Memory API, and Admin Reminders features. All 8 features verified working. Fixed a bug in celebrations endpoint where DOG_PERSONAS was a list but code expected a dictionary.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Family Dashboard and Mira Memory features fully working. Test member dipali@clubconcierge.in has 3 pets (Mojo, Mystique, Luna) and 4-6 memories stored. Family Discount badge shows for 2+ pets. Memory Timeline displays memories grouped by month.

family_dashboard_displays_all_pets.description: Family Dashboard shows all 3 pets with Soul completeness percentages
family_dashboard_displays_all_pets.evidence: Screenshot shows Mojo (290%), Mystique (0%), Luna (660%) with persona badges

family_dashboard_upcoming_moments.evidence: Mojo's Birthday In 7 days, Mojo's Gotcha Day In 9 days visible

family_discount_badge.description: Shows '10% Family Discount Active' badge for 2+ pets
family_discount_badge.evidence: Badge visible in Family Dashboard header for Dipali's Family with 3 pets

view_toggle_works.description: Toggle between Family Dashboard and Detailed View works
view_toggle_works.evidence: Both views render correctly when toggled

memory_timeline_grouped_by_month.description: Memory Timeline shows relationship memories grouped by month
memory_timeline_grouped_by_month.evidence: January 2026 section shows 4 memories: apartment move, grain-free treats, thunderstorm anxiety, Goa trip

mira_memory_stats_api.evidence: Returns total_memories, by_type, members_with_memories, critical_memories, suppressed_memories

mira_memory_admin_member_api.evidence: Returns 6 memories for dipali@clubconcierge.in grouped by type

admin_reminders_tab.description: Admin Reminders tab loads and shows scheduler status
admin_reminders_tab.evidence: Shows Active scheduler, 4 reminder types (Vaccination, Grooming, Birthday, Health Checkup)

admin_mira_memory_tab.description: Admin Mira Memory tab loads and can search member memories
admin_mira_memory_tab.evidence: Shows 4 total memories, 1 member, search returns 6 memories for test user

bug_fixed.issue: DOG_PERSONAS and CELEBRATION_OCCASIONS were lists but code used .get() expecting dictionaries
bug_fixed.fix: Converted lists to dictionaries after import: DOG_PERSONAS = {p['id']: p for p in DOG_PERSONAS_LIST}
